REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-17-2002. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED, TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD. TRIAL DATE VACATED. JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO, CLERK GREG CHUCK, REPORTER ROBERT BALIAN. (305)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEW, DARRYL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW, DARRYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIANG, DANNY DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE A. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT; B. POSSESSION OF 1559 11TH AVE IN S.F.; C. IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES; D. THE CLERK ISSUE A WRIT OF POSSESSION DIRECTING SHERIFF FOR THIS COUNTY REMOVE DEFTS & OCCUPANTS FR THE ABOVE-DESCRIBED PREMISES.
ORDER RE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF AMENDED JUDGMENT. 12/12/02 DEPT 302. JUDGE ROBERTSON.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEW, DARRYL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW, DARRYL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIANG, DANNY AMENDED JUDGMENT. A. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT; B. POSSESSION OF 1559-11TH AVE IN SF, THE SUBJECT PREMISES; C. IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION OF SUBJECT PREMISES; D. CLERK OF COURT ISSUE A WRIT OF POSSESSION DIRECTING THE SHERIFF FOR THIS COUNTY REMOVE DEFTS & OCCUPANTS FR THE ABOVE- DESCRIBED PREMISES; E. PLTF SHALL RECOVER FR DEFT LOST RENT & DAMAGES OF $4,077.87. PLTF SHALL FURTHER RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT & ATTYS' FEE PURS TO NOTICED MOTION.
